shopping_342.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent successfully identified the correct motherboard and added it to the cart. However, the shopping cart contained additional, unrelated items (lingerie, coat rack, lamp) that were not part of the objective. The task was to buy *a* motherboard, implying only the motherboard, and purchasing extraneous items constitutes a failure to precisely meet the objective.
shopping_342.REFLECTION: Always verify the contents of the shopping cart before proceeding to checkout. If the cart contains items not specified in the objective, remove them to ensure only the required items are purchased. The task implies purchasing *only* the specified item.
shopping_342.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The agent successfully identified the correct motherboard and added it to the cart. However, the shopping cart contained additional, unrelated items (lingerie, coat rack, lamp) that were not part of the objective. The task was to buy *a* motherboard, implying only the motherboard, and purchasing extraneous items constitutes a failure to precisely meet the objective.

REFLECTION:
Always verify the contents of the shopping cart before proceeding to checkout. If the cart contains items not specified in the objective, remove them to ensure only the required items are purchased. The task implies purchasing *only* the specified item.
